summary: Tested 3 inbox enhancements: 1) Filter pills - ALL 7 filters (Active, Unread, Flagged, AI, Archived, Closed, All) are present with correct icons. 2) Task Modal - Code review confirms all elements present (Title, Type picker, Priority picker, Due date quick picks, Note field, Save/Cancel buttons). 3) Swipe Actions - WebSwipeableItem wrapper is implemented for both personal and team inbox items with correct actions (Flag+Task on left, Tag+Archive on right for personal; Claim+Task on left, Tag on right for team). CRITICAL BUG: Clicking swipe action buttons navigates to thread instead of triggering action - z-index issue in WebSwipeableItem.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking swipe action buttons (Flag, Task, Tag, Archive) navigates to thread page instead of triggering the action. The content layer (z-index: 2) captures clicks even when swiped, preventing action buttons (z-index: 1) from receiving clicks.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: When content is translated (translateX !== 0), either: 1) Set pointerEvents: 'none' on the content layer, or 2) Increase z-index of action buttons to 3, or 3) Add a transparent overlay that captures clicks and routes them to the correct action button based on position

action_items: FIX: WebSwipeableItem click handling - action buttons are not clickable when content is swiped due to z-index issue. The content layer captures all clicks.
VERIFY: After fix, test that clicking Task swipe action opens the Quick Task Modal instead of navigating to thread
critical_code_review_comments: Filter pills implementation is correct - all 7 filters present with icons (lines 1357-1410 in inbox.tsx): Active, Unread, Flagged (flag icon), AI (sparkles icon), Archived (archive icon), Closed, All

Quick Task Modal implementation is complete (lines 1700-1823 in inbox.tsx): Title input (pre-filled), Type picker (Follow Up/Call/Text/Email/Meeting), Priority picker (Low/Medium/High), Due date quick picks (Today/Tomorrow/In 3 Days/Next Week), Note field, Save/Cancel buttons
WebSwipeableItem wrapper correctly configured for personal inbox (lines 966-1011): leftActions=[Flag, Task], rightActions=[Tag, Archive]
WebSwipeableItem wrapper correctly configured for team inbox (lines 1145-1183): leftActions=[Claim (for unclaimed), Task], rightActions=[Tag]
handleCreateTaskFromConversation (lines 677-693) correctly opens task modal with pre-filled title
handleSubmitTask (lines 695-716) correctly calls tasksAPI.create with all task fields

BUG: WebSwipeableItem.tsx lines 171-175 - content layer has zIndex: 2, action layers have zIndex: 1. When content is translated, action buttons should be clickable but content layer still captures clicks

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Filter pills 100%, Task Modal code 100%, Swipe actions visible but not clickable (bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Three inbox enhancements tested: 1) Filter pills all working correctly with icons. 2) Task modal code is complete but couldn't test UI due to swipe action bug. 3) Swipe actions are visible after swiping but clicking them navigates to thread instead of triggering action. Main agent needs to fix WebSwipeableItem z-index/click handling issue.

filter_pills.Flagged filter with flag icon: PASS - visible with orange flag icon
